tasks.title: Identify user intent for @Documents
tasks.description: Determine what the user wants to do with the specified document(s), such as open, read, summarize, edit, or create.

tasks.title: Locate and access the specified document(s)
tasks.description: Find and retrieve the file(s) referenced by @Documents from the system.

tasks.title: Process document according to identified intent
tasks.description: Perform the requested action on the document(s) (e.g., display content, extract key points, allow editing).

pending_steps.title: Locate and access the specified document(s)
Process document according to identified intent
